title: ceropegia ciliatior
intro: Ceropegia ciliatior, also known as the 'Gaster's hook' or 'hooked-stemmed ceropegia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceropegia ciliatior include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Ceropegia ciliatior is typically prepared in herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat its listed health benefits.
